seoTitle: Update SEO Titles and Meta Descriptions in Squarespace
metaDescription: Learn how to edit SEO titles and meta descriptions in Squarespace to improve search rankings and click-through rates for your pages.
intro: Well-written SEO titles and meta descriptions directly affect how your Squarespace pages perform in search results and how many people click through to visit. This tutorial walks through where to find these settings and how to write titles and descriptions that improve visibility and engagement.

steps.heading: Navigate to SEO settings
steps.body: Locate the SEO settings section within your Squarespace page or site settings where titles and descriptions can be edited.

steps.heading: Update SEO titles
steps.body: Change the SEO title for each page so it clearly and accurately reflects the page's content while remaining appealing to searchers.

steps.heading: Modify meta descriptions
steps.body: Write concise, compelling meta descriptions that summarize the page and give visitors a reason to click through from search results.

steps.heading: Follow best practices for different page types
steps.body: Tailor your approach to SEO titles and descriptions depending on the type of page, whether it's a product, blog post, or landing page.

steps.heading: Review for consistency and responsiveness
steps.body: Check that your updated titles and descriptions display well across devices and remain consistent with your overall site messaging.

faq.question: Where do I edit SEO titles in Squarespace?
faq.answer: They're found within each page's settings, in the section dedicated to SEO options.

faq.question: How long should a meta description be?
faq.answer: The tutorial covers best practices for crafting effective, compelling meta descriptions, generally kept concise enough to display fully in search results.

faq.question: Does updating these fields actually improve rankings?
faq.answer: Well-crafted SEO titles and descriptions can improve both search visibility and click-through rates, though they're one part of a broader SEO strategy.

faq.question: Can I set different SEO titles for different page types?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers tailoring these elements for various page types across your site.

faq.question: Is this suitable for someone new to SEO?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial is designed for users of all experience levels, including beginners and small business owners.
